name: SEATech Ventures Corp.
summary: PART I Corporate History SEATech Ventures Corp., a Nevada corporation (the Company) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on April 2, 2018. On May 2, 2018, the Company acquired 100% interest in SEATech Ventures Corp., a private limited liability company incorporated in Labuan, Malaysia. On December 21, 2018, SEATech Ventures Corp., the Malaysia Company acquired 100% interest in SEATech Ventures (HK) Limited, a private limited company incorporated in Hong Kong. On October 04, 202...
